reasoning: The Lean signature uses `LocPathConnectedSpace X` which is Mathlib's standard class for "locally path connected" (path-connected neighborhoods form a neighborhood basis). It hypothesizes `IsOpen U` and `IsConnected U` (which is `U.Nonempty ∧ IsPreconnected U` in Mathlib) and concludes `IsPathConnected U` (nonempty and any two points joined by a path in U). Both `IsConnected` and `IsPathConnected` in Mathlib include nonemptiness, matching standard topology conventions used by Munkres. This is exactly the forward direction of the Mathlib lemma `IsOpen.isConnected_iff_isPathConnected`, and exactly matches the informal claim "every connected open set in X is path connected" under the assumption of local path connectedness. No hypotheses are added or dropped.
